name: Apogee
description: AI browser assistant for articles, videos, emails and more. Runs in-browser via WebGPU and Ollama.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; default-src 'self'; connect-src http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://*.hf.co https://raw.githubusercontent.com; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; style-src 'self'
